title: Major Shonen Jump Creator Breaks Silence on Anime’s Debut
content: The anime debut of a major Shonen Jump series, Akane-banash i , has finally been released, and it’s already receiving praise from fans for its exceptional story and animation. As one of the biggest Weekly Shonen Jump series, Akane-banashi has long grabbed the attention of fans in this season’s anime lineup.
author: ComicBook

title: Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End Opens Up About Major Change in Season 2: “A New Side of Her”
content: The exciting Season 2 of Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End reaches its conclusion after teasing the Golden Land Arc. The series continues the journey of Frieren and her party as they continue their travels to the North after Fern became a First Class Mage.
author: ComicBook

title: Major Crunchyroll Isekai Replaces Opening After Confirmed AI Use Controversy
content: One major Isekai franchise now streaming with Crunchyroll has fully replaced its opening sequence after confirming A.I. use and facing a huge backlash with fans. The Spring 2026 anime schedule is now in full gear as a new wave of anime has made their return with new episodes.
author: ComicBook

title: I’ve Been Waiting Years for This Promising Game (& It’s Getting an Anime)
content: When this game was first revealed many years ago, it immediately stood out and grabbed my attention. Even as its release date has shifted and updates slow down, that initial spark has stuck with me.
author: ComicBook

title: DC’s Secretly Best Animated Series to Return With Surprise Release This May
content: DC Comics has had a long history of great animated shows , but their secretly best one is making a surprise comeback with a special free release coming later this May. It’s been a great year to be a Warner Bros.
author: ComicBook

title: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle Finally Ends Theater Run After 9 Months (& Readies for Streaming Release)
content: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle has ended its now historic run across theaters in Japan, and that means the film is finally one step closer to its highly anticipated streaming release.
author: ComicBook

title: One Piece Kicks Off Elbaph Arc With New Anime Opening & Ending (Watch Now)
content: One Piece has now returned to action with a brand new season of the TV anime, and has kicked off the Elbaph Arc in style with a new opening and ending theme sequence to celebrate.
author: ComicBook

title: After 13 Years, Surprise Crunchyroll Anime Confirms Final Season Return
content: 13 years after the anime adaptation first began, a surprise franchise you can now stream on Crunchyroll has revealed plans to return for what seems to be its final season. It’s been a great year for anime fans thus far, and the new wave of Spring 2026 anime releases is keeping that strong with notable premieres thus…
author: ComicBook

title: Shonen Jump Cancels Its Fourth Major 2026 Series (& Fans Were Ready for the End)
content: Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump magazine has officially cancelled its fourth major manga series this year, and this time fans were ready for its finale. Shonen Jump entered a new quarter of the magazine, and that meant it was time for some Spring cleaning.
author: ComicBook

title: One Piece Reveals New Opening & Ending Featuring Mural and Holy Knights
content: ONE PIECE anime revealed the new opening and ending videos, featuring the theme songs by AiNA THE END and Jisoku 36km. The anime returned after a 3-month break on April 5, starting the Elbaph Arc.
author: Anime Corner
